General.Name: Cybernaut International Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Ciprun Technology Holdings Company Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides e-commerce solutions and related support services in the People's Republic of China, Europe, North America, and Hong Kong. The company operates in two segments, Money Lending and Internet Business. It offers money lending, e-commerce, and internet education services. The company was formerly known as Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited and changed its name to Ciprun Technology Holdings Company Limited in January 2026. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Seapower Tower, Concordia Plaza, Kowloon, Hong Kong
